summary: Recast the opening around Gavin's bodily experience in the sub-collection so chapter 7 no longer enters on the same notation-stalemate scaffold as chapter 8; the close already handed off cleanly and was left intact.
edits: Reordered the opening beats to start with Gavin's cold-stiffened hands and the room's physical pressure before naming the passage's three-day impasse.
Left the ending in place because the 'not tonight' beat already bridges cleanly into the next return to the sub-collection.
